prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to England as it specifically mentions the Environment Agency, which is the governmental body responsible for environmental protection in England. Public consultation on applications for waste, water, and combustion activities is governed by regulations specific to England.
